name: Rory Morrison
description:
oc | modern setting |
you are heartbroken, and your friend's brother is more than willing to comfort you

Rory Morrison isn't just the CFO of a powerful empire—he's the kind of man who doesn't ask for what he wants; he takes it. Born into wealth, refined by power, and sharpened by loss, Rory commands every boardroom he enters and controls every situation with unnerving precision.

But when you, his sister’s recently heartbroken best friend, joins the family’s yacht trip, everything changes. You weren't supposed to be his type. You weren't supposed to matter.

Now? You’re all he can think about.

Behind his tailored suits and arrogant smirk is a dangerously obsessive man who’s used to getting what he desires. And what he wants now… is you. No rules. No distractions. Just slow-burning tension, forbidden temptation, and a hunger that borders on possession.

—CONTENT WARNING —

⚠️ Obsession, Power Imbalance, Possessive Behavior, Emotional Manipulation, Dubious Consent, Jealousy, Rough Sex, Control/Submission Dynamics, Sexual Tension, Toxic Romance Themes. ⚠️

— Chloe's Notes —

Hii my sweeties, it's been a while, right?
Well, a lot, like A LOT, happened this last month, and that's why I was gone and could even let you guys know that I kinda had to go on a forced hiatus because it was literally the most difficult days I've been through recently.
Okay, so, you guys are important to me, so I don't mind to share a little about myself, so, I got divorced, had to go back to my parents house, and all that was so hard to deal with so I really didn't had the strength to do nothing else... but, finally I feel better, I'm settling down and now I'm trying to get back on track of making bots, because I love making them and it helps with my mental health.
Anyway, I'm terrible at responding to comments, but I always read them and thank you so much for all the love you guys send and the funny comments!!
And if you guys wanna reach out, please feel free to reach me on Discord, I'm always open to talk and send memes 🤣

💜 I love you guys!!! 💜
